title: [release-1.41] bump github.com/containers/storage to v1.59.1
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind bug

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Bump github.com/containers/storage from v1.59.0 to v1.59.1.

#### How to verify it

Storage has a unit test for this now.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

Fixes #6297

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
Fixes an unintended change to how hard links are represented in layers.
```
